lane_decisions.reason: No approved pre-design PANEL_ALLOCATION_SOURCE has been identified in the accepted generator bundle.
lane_decisions.authority_needed: signed approval to run bounded panel allocation source review or direct signed source authority

lane_decisions.reason: No verified component geometry library or approved generic conservative envelope rule exists for the active evidence set.
lane_decisions.authority_needed: signed approval of verified geometry library or conservative generic envelope rule family

lane_decisions.reason: Cabinet, surface, clearance, thermal, ventilation, spare-space, and fill-denominator policy choices are fabrication/domain rules requiring explicit authority.
lane_decisions.authority_needed: signed fabrication-domain rule decision for each accepted reusable rule family

human_authority_choices.label: AUTHORIZE_PANEL_ALLOCATION_SOURCE_REVIEW
human_authority_choices.effect: starts bounded source-review branch only; no implementation until source approval and audit pass

human_authority_choices.label: AUTHORIZE_COMPONENT_GEOMETRY_AUTHORITY
human_authority_choices.effect: allows a verified geometry library or conservative envelope rule proposal to enter test-before-fix implementation planning

human_authority_choices.label: AUTHORIZE_TOPOLOGY_SIZING_PLACEMENT_RULE_AUTHORITY
human_authority_choices.effect: allows selected reusable fabrication rule families to enter test-before-fix implementation planning

human_authority_choices.label: REJECT_ALL_AUTHORITY_LANES
human_authority_choices.effect: moves to terminal-candidate review for STRUCTURAL_SOURCE_INSUFFICIENCY and FABRICATION_DOMAIN_DECISION_REQUIRED
